task.title: Make drift propagation assurance-grade
task.summary: Unify graph/status drift routing, honor lint freshness config, fix lane freshness anchors, and add targeted tests without increasing default context load.

goal.outcome: Any deterministic drift surfaced by lint, graph, roadmap, build, validation, or mapped code changes routes through one coherent next-action/freshness model with targeted test coverage and compact generated views.
acceptance: Lint drift honors configured word-count thresholds/exemptions and does not create false untracked drift in this repo.
codewiki_state graph/status next-action reporting cannot say graph aligned while status reports unresolved drift.
Agency freshness anchors compare against previous nested status lens and remain stable across no-op refreshes.
Tests cover config-driven lint, graph/status drift agreement, build/validation reconciliation retention, and freshness anchor stability.
Default state/graph outputs stay compact: route to exact files; no large doc/code inlining.
non_goals: Do not add SQLite or external storage.
Do not generate extra long-lived view files beyond index_graph.json.
Do not broaden default codewiki_state output or inline full source/docs.
verification: npm run test:smoke or targeted smoke coverage
codewiki_state refresh=true shows no contradictory graph/status drift

summary: Implemented TASK-066 drift propagation assurance fixes with targeted tests and compact routing.
checks_run: source rebuild via CodewikiRebuilder showed reconciliation:implementation for TASK-066, untracked_specs=0, one advisory large-doc health warning only

evidence: Added focused feature smoke test instead of expanding default state payloads.
Kept advisory large-doc warnings visible in health without forcing compiler routing.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Graph filters generated and .codewiki data dirty paths from code drift, maps actionable lint to reconciliation, and treats open task code scopes as coverage.
Status freshness reads prior nested status lens and excludes generated artifacts from code freshness digests.
notes: Used direct source rebuild because live pi codewiki tools were loaded before code edits; avoided tool refresh after final builds to prevent stale tool rebuild output.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Added focused feature smoke test instead of expanding default state payloads.
Kept advisory large-doc warnings visible in health without forcing compiler routing.
code_change_evidence: Graph filters generated and .codewiki data dirty paths from code drift, maps actionable lint to reconciliation, and treats open task code scopes as coverage.
Status freshness reads prior nested status lens and excludes generated artifacts from code freshness digests.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Lint drift honors configured word-count thresholds/exemptions and does not create false untracked drift in this repo.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: lint.ts now reads project.config.lint.word_count_warn/word_count_exempt/forbidden_headings; drift-propagation.test.mjs verifies 1600 threshold suppresses 1105-word warning while 1000 threshold reports it.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: codewiki_state graph/status next-action reporting cannot say graph aligned while status reports unresolved drift.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: graph.ts ingests actionable lint issues into reconciliation; state-builders uses actionable lint filtering; source rebuild reports next_step=reconciliation:implementation with untracked_specs=0 and rec_count=1 for TASK-066.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Agency freshness anchors compare against previous nested status lens and remain stable across no-op refreshes.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: codewiki-rebuilder reads previousState.lenses.status; state-builders excludes generated paths from lane code digests; test verifies .codewiki/index_graph.json edits do not change code_digest while source edits do.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Tests cover config-driven lint, graph/status drift agreement, build/validation reconciliation retention, and freshness anchor stability.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: tests/smoke/drift-propagation.test.mjs covers lint config, actionable lint reconciliation, generated dirty exclusion, open task code coverage, status next_step, and freshness; existing builds.test.mjs covers build/validation reconciliation retention.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Default state/graph outputs stay compact: route to exact files; no large doc/code inlining.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Implementation adds nodes/edges/reconciliation metadata only; no source/doc content is inlined in graph/status state.

closure_brief.user_intent: Assure that code, documentation, and user-intent drift propagates coherently through CodeWiki over time without increasing token cost.
implemented_changes: Configured lint thresholds now control large-doc drift.
Graph reconciliation now includes actionable lint drift, excludes generated/wiki data from code dirty drift, and recognizes open task code scopes.
Freshness anchors now compare against previous nested status and ignore generated graph artifacts.
Product/system knowledge documents now require graph/status next-action agreement and stable freshness.
Targeted feature smoke test proves drift routing and freshness behavior.
acceptance_evidence: All acceptance criteria mapped in implementation build acceptance_mapping.
non_goals_preserved: No new database or external storage.
No extra long-lived view files beyond index_graph.json.
No broader default codewiki_state output or large content inlining.
remaining_risks: Reload current Pi extension before trusting live codewiki_state tool output from this session.

risks: Live Pi session may need /reload before codewiki_state tool reflects source changes in-process.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-066 Make drift propagation assurance-grade implementation evidence
commit.body:
Implemented TASK-066 drift propagation assurance fixes with targeted tests and compact routing.

Checks: npm run typecheck, npm run test:features, npm run test:smoke, npm run check:architecture, npm run test:pack, source rebuild via CodewikiRebuilder showed reconciliation:implementation for TASK-066, untracked_specs=0, one advisory large-doc health warning only
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
